hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.test\.ts\|\.spec\.ts'; then echo 'TEST QUALITY CHECK: Verify NO theatrical anti-patterns: .catch(() => false), || true, toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0), conditional expects without else.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then COMMIT_MSG=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B 2>/dev/null); if echo "$COMMIT_MSG" | grep -qE '^(feat|fix|refactor|docs|test|chore|ci|perf|style|build)'; then true; else echo 'COMMIT-QUALITY WARNING: Message does not follow conventional commits (feat:|fix:|refactor:|docs:|test:|chore:).'; fi; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then bash ~/.claude/hooks/webhook-git-audit.sh; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'npm test|npx vitest|npx playwright'; then bash ~/.claude/hooks/webhook-test-metrics.sh; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'npm run build'; then bash ~/.claude/hooks/webhook-build-alert.sh; fi

bash ~/.claude/scripts/memory-guard.sh >/dev/null 2>&1; EXIT=$?; if [ $EXIT -eq 2 ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Memory pressure CRITICAL. Fechar sessoes/terminais antes de spawnar novos agents. Rode: bash ~/.claude/scripts/memory-guard.sh para detalhes.'; exit 2; elif [ $EXIT -eq 1 ]; then echo 'WARNING: Memory pressure elevada. Considere aguardar agents atuais terminarem antes de spawnar novos.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'vercel --prod'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use CI/CD pipeline (gh pr create + merge) instead of direct vercel --prod'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push.*--force'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Force push is dangerous. Use git push without --force, or discuss with user first.'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q -- '--no-verify'; then echo 'BLOCKED: --no-verify bypasses safety hooks. Fix the underlying issue instead.'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git stash'; then echo 'WARNING: git stash can cause issues with lint-staged. Consider git commit (WIP) instead.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'supabase db push'; then echo 'WARNING: supabase db push applies migrations to remote DB. Verify target environment first.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'gh pr create|vercel deploy'; then BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ]; then echo 'DEPLOY PREFLIGHT BLOCKED: Cannot deploy from main/master directly. Create a feature branch first.'; exit 2; fi; fi

INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; for f in .env .mcp.json package.json tsconfig.json vercel.json playwright.config.ts; do if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "$f"; then echo "WARNING: Writing to config file $f. Use Edit tool for surgical changes instead of Write to avoid overwriting existing config."; break; fi; done
